title: misch origins, Outclassed
description: Despite tragedy at future sight, the world is at equilibrium
body:
...

![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c35c44ab4b3a66eaa48e5752a7e2744d5663f5a_0.webp)

# about the pack
, choose to spawn as one of multiple origins

, ranges from simple animals to myths, each with their related strengths that work great in both single and multiplayer

, click the spoilers to show each of their GUI's !

_, dont forget to download the resourcepack_

![Spoilers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b217ee510e603e773c4779707894636d86bde98.png)

# spoiler content

![Amphibian Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c434a46b8929ac668a4627a435c73be374efba75_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
, amphibian is squishy, but has mini-tools to help them and allies survive

, with different craftable ointments, a command grab and overtime heal, amphibian can be a decent support

![Amphibian GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b90db28df2e67ac1269aeb1a1d29524397857462.png)

</details>

![Rammard Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f972230c59f1eeb3e47837e55d3b7e11fce84eb_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
, rammard has both good tanking and damaging capability

, their horns mechanic also allow them to farm Ivory, which are grinded into lots of XP

![Rammard GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb30d78cc40d8c6c74aa5f6617fc5393cb3fe887.png)

</details>

![Practice Dummy Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc9e6e3cbc9bd5791b587542e5f5377a0f5f6275_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
, by far has the highest potential to outlive anyone, only being weak to fire and magic

, it is not just good for tanking, but for supporting allies with free XP and durability mending
  
![Practice Dummy GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/156a7ee9ec4a88920e90e1d577a03b40620faa87.png)

</details>



![Lament Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38fa1ed748b3d56f67cb13a0b4f4f49360112a9b_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
, lament cannot deal much damage, and must avoid fights by phasing, walking on water, or slowing targets

, if necessary, lament can deal devastating amounts of damage quickly against attackers for a short period

![Lament GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1c002556da4c585fb667f1210acea3f828c54be.png)

</details>

![Phenic Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8daed4fae67585fc5a2afba24b17f04c87b79127_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
, phenic can swiftly move around the ground/sky, chasing enemies or allies to assist them with strong healing

, though phenic is fragile, their immortality will make sure you lose no progress and return quickly

, the human version is weaker, but has the pro of having the normal amount of health

![Phenic GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4b647dd9ea8ae711ae4d5e48bc820c3e3251a14.png)

</details>

![Vampire Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c3296c4cbb18daa130a3f56fdc76e4bbe074763_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
, vampire can fight bare-handed effectively, who needs weapons anyways

, vampire also has no trouble in long fights due to strong self-heal and buffs
![Vampire GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad1adaf3de20ac837b03e6c3a84966c4d5f25cbc.png)

</details>

![Additional Info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53dd77347171c5424df40bf8a33f68ff449f5d46_0.webp)

# notes

, all players can craft different vanity ! to access these, follow the steps
- name a nametag any of the following :
- ( Vanity-General-#1 ) ( Vanity-Phenic-#1 ) ( Vanity-Phenic-#2 ) ( Vanity-Vampire-#1 )
![Vanity 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd8228ff8216036046eb85c2991c3c7df35256bb.png)
- grab a block of diamond, place it on your off-hand, and hold the nametag and RIGHT-CLICK
![Vanity 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2dc9d08ebb01d28cef9adf92b323e1b866bcd356.png)
- youll be given a voucher that can be used to claim your vanity                         
![Vanity 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90b180cb542464c196d43f9fcae005e4ec7f50a2.png)

, all origins can be used by multiple people, no limits !

![Outclassed Drawing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf68dd5210f32774e55febee3651542d3e3a8213.png)
